g.text: PLATFORM repo · single source of truth
tofu/ lives in the same repo
bootstrapped ONCE by hand — then it manages itself

text.font-family: Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: argo sync-waves — what deploys in which order:
opens dependency PRs against both repos
TENANT drova — own repos, own GITOPS pipeline
fully separated from the platform repo (talos-homelab)
argocd only points at this repo — platform & tenant stay decoupled (only prod there)
NetBird — private vpn mesh · 0 open ports -> roadmap: zero-trust
immutable talos nodes · spread across both hardware zones
TLS by cert-manager · cilium L2 loadbalancer · OWASP crs · rate-limiting
eBPF cni, kube-proxy-less, hubble | istio sidecar mesh · mTLS · kiali -> roadmap: ambient mode
workflow automation · queue: redis · db: cnpg
SSO — oidc clients: argocd · grafana · n8n
drova · n8n · keycloak — HA · poolers · pitr
event streams · cache & queues · SIEM + kibana
rbd · cephfs · rgw object store (S3) · replica 2 · zone-aware,
velero + cnpg barman backups land in rgw · survives a host loss
logs: all pods -> vector -> elasticsearch (SIEM) + loki | metrics: exporters -> prometheus |
traces -> otel -> tempo · jaeger. grafana dashboards · gatus status page
these cluster nodes run inside the proxmox vms up top
